privileged_info_summary: The task targets quotes.toscrape.com, a real public website created as a web scraping tutorial sandbox. The login credentials 'admin' and 'password' are valid (any credentials work on the login endpoint due to intentional design). However, critical issues exist: The website is accessible via HTTPS, not HTTP as specified in metadata, and there is no /logout/ endpoint on the website. The official spidyquotes endpoint documentation lists: /, /scroll, /js, /js-delayed/, /tableful, /login, /viewState, and /random. Attempting to access /logout/ returns a 404 error. The only documented content difference between authenticated and unauthenticated users is the display of GoodReads links, not a logout URL.
